title: OSC Guntur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 03 Case Worker and Multi Purpose Staff Posts
description: One Stop Centre Guntur (OSC Guntur) has announced the official notification for the recruitment of 03 Case Worker and Multi-Purpose Staff Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the Any Degree 10th Pass can grab this chance and apply for the OSC Guntur Recruitment 2026 . Here we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can fill in the application form by the last da...
